title: Swing Component Hierarchy & Core Architecture
description: A visual breakdown of the core Swing component class hierarchy and its foundational relationship to AWT, highlighting key component categories and architectural concepts.
relationships: Swing (javax.swing) is built on top of AWT (java.awt)
JComponent is the base class for all lightweight Swing components and inherits from AWT's Container
All Swing components (JButton, JPanel, etc.) are descendants of JComponent
Top-Level Containers hold Intermediate Containers which hold Atomic Components
Pluggable Look & Feel and MVC architecture are core features enabled by the JComponent class
